title: [codereview-pass3] coap_dtn.c: fix deaddrop_post IID lookup, add string.h for memcpy, rate limit collision from IID[7], direct oscore_unprotect_request, update confessions_post
close_reason: Completed 3 codereview passes with beads am76,i986,v9h5; fixed IID lookup with lichen_eui64_to_iid normalization, string.h via ipv6_addr include+memcpy, per-IID[7] rate limit array in confessions_post to prevent collisions, switched to direct oscore_unprotect_request+option parse in deaddrop_post, updated init. No P0/P1 left in this scope (mutex in separate jzne). Verified via 3 review passes. bd ready shows related mutex issues filed.
